title: bidens clavata
intro: Bidens clavata, also known as the bidens or two-headed beggar-ticks, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihemorrhagic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and menstrual disorders. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for treating injuries and infections. Bidens clavata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and salves, to treat various health issues.
